title: Float latent window persists on completion (click to open app)
description: The OS floating latent window (MPI-270) closed the moment a generation finished. Now it stays open showing the final result (returned image, or the last latent for video results), clickable to restore the app. Closes only on user click, the X, or app un-minimize. Bridge routes generation:complete to a new float-latent:finalize (paint item.filePath) instead of dropping the tile; cancel/error still drop. Files: js/shell/floatLatentBridge.js, main.js, main/floatLatentWindow.cjs, main/float-latent.html.
